data structure,project information	Fiscal Year
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv contains the fiscal year data for each project.

data structure,project information	Programming Process
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv contains the programming process data for each project.

data structure,project status	Project_Registry.csv
Status
Project_Registry.csv indicates the status of each project.

data structure,organization classification	Organisation Class
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv includes the classification of organizations involved in projects.

data structure,sector classification	Project_Registry.csv
Sector Name
Project_Registry.csv contains information on the sector names for each project.

data structure,unique identifier	Project Number
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv assigns a unique project number to each project.

data structure,thematic marker	Climate Change Adaptation
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv tracks whether projects address climate change adaptation.

data structure,organization identification	Organisation ID
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv includes the organization ID for each project.

data structure,organization involved	Organisation Name
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv includes the organization name for each project.

data structure,thematic marker	Desertification
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv tracks whether projects involve anti-desertification efforts.

aid classification,data structure	Bilateral Aid
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv indicates if the project is classified as bilateral aid.

data structure,project division	Division Name
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv includes the name of the division responsible for each project.

data structure,financial data	Amount Spent
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv provides the total amount of money spent on each project.

data structure,sector allocation	Project_Registry.csv
Sector Percent
Project_Registry.csv reports the budget percentage allocated to each sector.

data structure,section information	Project_Registry.csv
Section Name
Project_Registry.csv includes the section name for every project.

data structure,location identification	Project Browser Country ID
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv contains the project browser country ID for each project.

data.src_id: ICT as a Tool for Development
data.content:
data structure,thematic marker	ICT as a Tool for Development
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv marks projects using information and communication technology for development purposes.

data structure,location classification	Continent Name
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv contains the continent information for all projects.

data structure,location identification	CountryRegion Name
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv lists the country or region for each project.

data structure,section identification	Project_Registry.csv
Section ID
Project_Registry.csv contains the section ID data for each project.

data structure,thematic marker	Indigenous Issues
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv identifies projects addressing indigenous issues.

data structure,thematic marker	Project_Registry.csv
Youth Issues
Project_Registry.csv tracks projects targeting youth issues.

data structure,sector identification	Project_Registry.csv
Sector ID
Project_Registry.csv contains sector ID information for all projects.

branch identification,data structure	Branch ID
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv includes the branch ID for each project.

data structure,project delivery model	CIDA Business Delivery Model
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv records the CIDA business delivery model used for projects.

data structure,thematic marker	Children Issues
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv tracks projects that address children issues.

data structure,thematic marker	Disability Issues
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv includes markers for disability issues in projects.

data structure,organization classification	Organisation Type
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv lists the types of organizations involved in projects.

funding,organizational involvement	CIDA
Maximum CIDA Contribution
Maximum CIDA Contribution refers to the financial contribution made by CIDA to a project.

organizational responsibility,project management	Bangladesh
OGM Asia Pacific
OGM Asia Pacific is the branch managing the fund centre located in Bangladesh.

data.tgt_id: IAEA - International Atomic Energy Agency Technical Cooperation Fund
data.content:

Accounting_Snapshot.csv contains data involving the IAEA - International Atomic Energy Agency Technical Cooperation Fund as a regional standard.

Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv includes markers for biodiversity involvement in projects.

Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv provides the percentage of project focus on each country or region.

MID International Organizations
Accounting_Snapshot.csv includes information on projects managed by MID International Organizations.

Asia MC
Asia MC is a country or region located within the continent of Asia.

classification,organizational status	Foreign Non-Profit Making
United Nations
UNITED NATIONS is classified as or associated with the regional status of Foreign Non-Profit Making.

Untied Amount(Project-level Budget)
Project_Registry.csv contains the project budget at the project level.

MIO United Nations

Europe MC
Europe MC is a country or region located within the continent of Europe.

data structure,funding source	CFLI
Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv keeps track of CFLI funding for projects.

funding model,organizational structure	Core Funding
United Nations
UNITED NATIONS utilizes Core Funding as its business delivery model in the context of the dataset.

governance,organizational activity	Partner Development And Governance Involvement
United Nations
UNITED NATIONS is involved in partner development and governance activities according to the dataset.

data structure,regional involvement	Project_Registry.csv
Regional Program
Project_Registry.csv identifies projects as part of a regional program.

Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv contains FSTC percentage information for projects.

knowledge sharing,organizational activity	Knowledge For Development Involvement
United Nations

budget allocation,funding data	Project Level Budget Amount
